<?php namespace Hamcrest\Type; /* Copyright (c) 2010 hamcrest.org */ use Hamcrest\Core\IsTypeOf; /** * Tests whether the value is a string. */ class IsString extends IsTypeOf { /** * Creates a new instance of IsString */ public function __construct() { parent::__construct('string'); } /** * Is the value a string? * * @factory */ public static function stringValue() { return new self; } }
